comments.body: @davidstrauss I think you need to sign your commit - `git commit --amend -s` and force-push should be enough.

Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`

I'll need to get my GPG house in order to sign the commit. I mostly use my GPG hardware tokens for SSH, so I don't have the proper subkey signing stuff configured yet. I've been meaning to fix things, though, so I'll do that and re-push.
@davidstrauss Oh, sorry, not a fully GPG signature, just a Signed-off-by line, should have been more clear

Docs for the missing Signed-off-by are [here][1].

[1]: https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/blob/v0.5.2/CONTRIBUTING.md#sign-your-prs
@davidstrauss Thanks for the update and the catch.  We need to get this in sooner rather than later so I've just spun up #779 stealing your update.  Hope you can contribute again in the future!

> Thanks for the update and the catch. We need to get this in sooner rather than later so I've just spun up #779 stealing your update. Hope you can contribute again in the future!

No worries. For what it's worth, removing the `Signed-Off-By` requirement would make drive-by contributions (like those from clicking "Edit" on GitHub) easier.
